details: Design and evolution of a multitenant B2B SaaS architecture in Laravel + Vue environments.
Optimization of MySQL databases through strategic indexing and caching, improving overall performance by 35%.
Direct collaboration with the CTO in defining the technical roadmap and scalability decisions.
Development and maintenance of enterprise applications using Laravel, Vue.js, and Inertia.js.
Design of optimized MySQL database structures, reducing query times by 30%.
Automation of deployment processes, decreasing release times by 60%.
Implementation of advanced authentication and real-time notifications.
Mentoring junior developers and active participation in architecture decisions.
Tutoring and technical guidance for over 80 students in Web Development and JavaScript courses.
Resolving technical questions, reviewing projects, and evaluating assignments.
Improved course completion rates through personalized follow-up and continuous technical support.
Development of web interfaces using Vue.js and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
Implementation of reusable components and consumption of REST APIs.
Frontend performance optimization, reducing load times by 20%.
Collaboration in agile teams (Scrum), participating in code reviews and sprint planning.
Application of responsive design principles and improvement of user experience.
